name: error-metadata-not-object
description: Metadata that base64url-decodes to valid JSON but not an object (here a JSON array) is not a valid harness_metadata: the header reader drops it as a non-fatal malformed field, and the ingest boundary rejects it if it reaches the body.

error.rule: must decode to a JSON object

grounding: Metadata that decodes to valid JSON but not an object is invalid: the parser drops the field, and the ingest boundary rejects it if it reaches the body.
notes: x-tapes-harness-metadata here is base64url(no-pad) of the JSON array [1,2,3]. The parser drops the field (non-fatal) so the rest of the envelope still ingests.
